description: Run the gratuity calculation twice for the same employee with identical inputs. Both runs must produce identical output — same gratuity_amount, same total_settlement, same notes. Gratuity is deterministic; any difference between runs indicates non-deterministic behaviour (e.g. LLM in the arithmetic path).
test_procedure: 2. Run worker again with identical inputs → capture result_2

expected.invariant: no LLM in the arithmetic path — Claude is called only for cap-edge explanations when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set, and that output is notes only, not the amount
